title: Web — Pocket vs Instapaper vs Omnivore comparison
snippet: Pocket and Instapaper are hosted read-it-later services; Omnivore is the open-source self-hosted alternative with full-text search and tagging.

title: omnivore-app/omnivore — prior art
snippet: Languages: ts:800, tsx:200. A self-hosted read-it-later app: save articles, full-text search, tagging, mobile reading.

title: Docs — Meilisearch typo tolerance
snippet: Meilisearch provides sub-second full-text search with built-in typo tolerance and relevancy ranking out of the box.

title: Best way to extract clean readable content from a URL
snippet:
score: 47 · answered · answers: 6 · tags: readability, scraping

Use a Readability-style extractor to pull the article body from a saved URL.

title: #1421 Importing a large Pocket export times out [open]
snippet:
state: open · labels: import

Importing a large Pocket export of saved articles times out; needs batching.
